note: Opus via native Agent tool (model:opus), NOT claude2 — operator directive

claim: SYSTEMIC: internal causal graph is memory-ID->memory-ID (causal_edges source_id/target_id are memory_index row IDs), NOT entity-node. Every Cognee/Graphiti candidate's maps_to assumes an entity-node graph — a load-bearing mismatch that downgrades entity-merge candidates and marginalizes edge-fact-embedding.

Already implemented: insertEdge dedups on a SUPERSET composite key (source_id,target_id,relation,source_anchor,target_anchor) via SELECT-then-UPDATE/INSERT, idempotent; bulk INSERT OR IGNORE. Shipping = no-op.

contradiction-detection.ts rule-based only (no LLM), gated OFF; invalidateEdge sets invalid_at=now() txn-time. Both deltas absent: LLM-discovered contradictions + event-time close (invalid_at=new.valid_at). Highest value; split halves.

NET-NEW->EXTENDS: entity_catalog already merges on normalizeEntityName->canonical_name + alias collapse (zero-LLM), but on the retrieval/linking side, decoupled from causal-graph node creation (which is memory-ID, not entity-node). Net-new sliver = stable uuid5 surface + introducing entity nodes.

NET-NEW->EXTENDS: adaptive-fusion.ts already adapts per-intent/doc-type weights (INTENT_WEIGHT_PROFILES). Net-new sliver = only Mem0's additive (sum)/max_possible + channel-gated divisor + semantic gate FORMULA; low confidence it beats the tuned RRF+convergence superset — experimental.

NET-NEW holds: no entity vector index exists; closest analog is the rrf-fusion DEGREE channel (count-based, :17). Only the vector-matched-entity boost is net-new; scope to entity-embedding index -> new boost channel.
evidence: shared/algorithms/rrf-fusion.ts:17; entity_catalog has no embedding column

claim: NET-NEW holds (causal_edges has no embedding column) but M/M + lower-leverage on the memory-ID graph (edges have no standalone fact text; you'd synthesize one). Worth it only if entity/fact nodes are introduced.

Refuted as framed: built on a misread of Letta (iter-5: char-limit is advisory, no auto-eviction). Only salvage = a block-size-triggered compaction idea, net-new but unrelated to Letta's actual behavior.
